phases.name: Core OS Hardening and Methodology (MVP)
objectives: Finalize Orchestrator V2 and file-based state bus (.agents/inbox, active, review, logs)
Harden LLM Factory routing (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, Groq)
Implement OS Synthetic Routing (Fail-safes for non-compliant LLMs)
Achieve complete test coverage for core Engine components

phases.name: Multi-Tenant Orchestration (Dynamic Workspaces)
objectives: Upgrade Orchestrator to monitor isolated workspace directories (workspaces/*/inbox)
Remove hardcoded sequential routing blocks from the Atomic Engine
Dynamically resolve the next agent receiver by parsing local `workforce.yaml` definitions
Ensure the OS acts as a purely stateless pass-through for multi-tenant payloads

phases.name: Agentic UI Widgets
objectives: Design decoupled UI architecture for State Atoms
Implement State Publisher to stream JSON state updates
Create standalone Vanilla JS widgets (e.g., BudgetWidget)
Connect UI widgets to the OS State Bus
